creator: velcroleaf@rocketmail.com
text:
The libwww port will not build when the security/openssl port is compiled without support for SSLv2.  This is a new (and very useful) feature of openssl.

A sample complaint line, before the exit code 1:
../../Library/src/SSL/.libs/libwwwssl.so: undefined reference to `SSLv2_client_method'

This is related to this report: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=193482

As mentioned, there might be other ports that are broken as well.  I'll note them if I find them.
